title: poa acicularifolia subsp. ophitalis
intro: Poa acicularifolia subsp. ophitalis, also known as alpine poa, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with alpine poa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
